6 · AI Chat + Attachment
9:41
O/A Level AI
Powered by your resources
Hello! I'm your O/A Level study assistant. Ask me anything about your subjects or share a past paper!
Can you explain what's asked in question 3? I'm attaching the paper.
From your resources:
Question 3 involves calculating the velocity of a particle using kinematics equations. Based on the 2024 Physics mark scheme in your library, the expected method is:

v² = u² + 2as → v = √(2 × 9.8 × 5) ≈ 9.9 m/s
paper_scan.jpg
Ask about kinematics…
AI with RAG (cites your PDFs), image attach 📷, file attach 📎, attachment preview strip

O/A Level Resources — Android App
10 screens  ·  Material 3  ·  Forest Green Theme (#1B5E20)  ·  Kotlin + Jetpack Compose
These are design previews — the actual APK is built in Android Studio from the android/ directory
